name: GAF_SyteLine_ItemSearch_Tool_v1
description: Search for existing items in SyteLine by item code or description

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLItems
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Comma-separated list of properties to return. Use: Item,Description,UM,ProductCode,_ItemId
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: False
Description: SQL WHERE clause to filter results. Examples: Item = 'WIDGET-A' or Description LIKE '%widget%'
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Maximum number of records to return. Default: 10
Example Requests:
Search by item code:
GET /load/SLItems?properties=Item,Description,UM,ProductCode,_ItemId&filter=Item = 'WIDGET-A'
Search by description:
GET /load/SLItems?properties=Item,Description,UM,ProductCode,_ItemId&filter=Description LIKE '%Premium%'&recordCap=10
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array with item details.
Key Response Fields:
- Items: Array of item objects (empty array if not found)
- Item: Item code (unique identifier)
- Description: Item description
- UM: Unit of measure (e.g., EA, LB, BOX)
- ProductCode: Product code category
- _ItemId: Record identifier for updates
- Success: Boolean indicating API call success
If no items match the search criteria, Items will be an empty array.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Use this tool to search for existing items in SyteLine before creating new ones.
Search by item code (exact): filter=Item = 'ITEM-CODE'
Search by description (partial): filter=Description LIKE '%text%'
Returns item details if found, empty Items array if not found.
Use to check if an item exists before inserting.

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
